atom.description: The UI is a function of state: `UI = f(state)`. The composable tree describes what the screen looks like for the current state value; it does not imperatively mutate views to reach that state. To change the screen, mutate the state and let Compose re-derive the tree. The agent never holds a reference to a `Button` and calls `setEnabled(false)` on it — instead, `enabled` is a piece of state that the button reads at composition time.
